data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Cancellation with retention offers', but the evidence provided does not confirm that this requirement is fully satisfied. While the linked use case mentions a cancellation attempt triggering an offer of 'Stay and get next month 50% off', there is no concrete evidence of the implementation or functionality of this offer in the system. This indicates a gap in the requirement coverage, as the evidence does not demonstrate that the cancellation process includes retention offers as required.
gaps: No concrete evidence of the cancellation process including retention offers.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the cancellation with retention offers.
